---
title: 'Signature: Keep As/Revert To Draft'
date: '2020-07-01T07:37:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '6381557429263297583'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
---

Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br /><br />Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests: <a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br /><br />Flavia Wolfe<br /><br /><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br /><br /><a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br /><br /><a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br /><br /><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br /><br /><iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br /><br />
